name: chart-tooltip-demo
visual_summary: A tooltip component that can be used to display information about a chart. It is useful for displaying specific data points or events on a chart without cluttering the main view. Suitable for use in dashboards, data visualizations, and analytics applications.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-tooltip-demo
Description: A tooltip component that can be used to display information about a chart. It is useful for displaying specific data points or events on a chart without cluttering the main view. Suitable for use in dashboards, data visualizations, and analytics applications.
Style: material
Interactions: clickable
Tags: tooltip, chart, data visualization, dashboard, analytics

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
